en: Please provide Job Description for the specified position
Job Description:\r\nDoes the contractor have an accurate and detailed description of the technical competencies required for this position?

Please provide Job description for the specified position, Pre-employment evidence documenting employee's skills, New hire testing, Resumes, Records from union halls documenting prior work experience and skill level
Selection and Hiring:\r\nDoes the contractor select and hire employees who have the prerequisite skill and knowledge to fulfill the requirements of the position?
Please provide Job Descriptions, Training records for job position that include necessary information, Other training documentation that provides the training required for discrete positions.

Training:\r\nWhat are the training requirements for the position? Are training requirements for each discrete craft or professional level (e.g. craftsman 1, -2, -3) provided? Does the contractor keep adequate training records that document the required training for the position including type of training, required frequency and test results (if applicable)?
